title: Slendor Magnetic Stirrer Hot Plate Mixer 79-1 Lab Stirrers Hotplate Max 2400 RPM Stir Plate with Stir Bar and Support Stand
description:
Stepless Adjustment--79-1 magnetic stirrer hot plate adopts stepless speed regulation design, easy to adjust. Fully enclosed heating plate, no open flame, fast heating, durable. Adjust as needed. The maximum stirring speed is up to 2400RPM.
Rapid Heating--Heating Power: 250W, Max Temp: 100°C/212°F The magnetic stirrer can stir and heat at the same time. Note: The 79-1 lab stirrer has no temperature display, and an additional thermometer is required to measure the temperature during use.
Advanced Material--The chemistry heat magnetic mixer is made of advanced materials, resistant to high temperature, abrasion, and chemical corrosion. Each stir hot plate stirrer has been tested and inspected, and the quality is guaranteed. 1 inch Teflon coated stir bar and fuse included.
Widely Used--The magnetic heated stirrer heats and stirs at the same time, which is very suitable for scientific research institutions, industry, agriculture, laboratories and universities. Work continuously for 4 hours in high-speed state and 8 hours in medium-speed state.
Quality Assurance--The professional magnetic hotplate stirrer has undergone strict quality inspection and can operate stably for a long time. If you have any questions about the lab hot plate, you can contact the seller's customer service at any time.
reviews_5s:
I was lookin for a hot plate to mix my terps and distillate and all the other ones were crazy expensive. Gave this a shot and I gotta say, it does everything I need it to. I thought it would be trash but low price doesn't mean low quality. I didn't use anything to meausure the temperature so I can't say exactly how reliable it is but it heats up quick and hot enough to make some really thick distillate turn really viscousThis has worked great for doing lab work and making things mix nicely with the heating aspect of the hot plate. Normally, blending sucrose in the water mixture doesn't blend well without heat, and this blends and heats all in one and works great!Gets hot fast but won't cause a fireVery simple but functional device, I’m frequently a fan of these minimalist designs, magnet works well with stir bars even in half gallon mason jars where the glass of the bottom is slightly concave. Able to run stirring for extended periods without issue.

Extremely quiet to the point of being easy to forget you have it runningThis is not near the top of the line for chemistry but for a hobbyist like me it works great. It supported a 500 ML beaker with a moderate density of non-liquid stuff ( 26 grams of ground up leaves for extraction) for 48 hours of constant temperature and stirring rate. I recommend additional stirrers if you are processing different stuff.As soon I got it opened it up set it up tested it and I'm satisfied.Half as much as the higher end. Lmste gets hotter thsn you think it would so careful. But once u get jt set works great for the money. The magnet for the mixer sticks js a little loud and out of balance but can't beat it for the moneyIt saves me time by stirring for me and I ca. tend to other things! Bit heating and stir work great! No problems at all!It's solid like lab ware used to be, no plastic. Heat control is a bonus for my needs. Always wanted a stirrer but couldn't afford it. This is a good one for a good price.
reviews_1s:
I literally stirred for 20 min and it stopped workingPlay Video
I decided to open my box after getting it from my courier, the unit itself looks good, and I was surprised to see 2 knobs for temperature and spin that I didn't know it had, went to my workbench, tried to turn it on, and no lights, gave it a chance thinking only the lights were off, but the plate is cold, also no stirring came with another fuse, but to no avail. I'm not happyI went with this one due to the price point and having the ability to adjust the heat. Total spectrum of the heat knob varies about 3 degrees from left to right. The magnetic stir function did not work out of the box. Spend a little more and leave this piece of junk where it sits.Play Video
Advertised in the packaging as “no noise” but the stirring rod bangs up against anything it’s placed in. I verified the surface is level and so is the beaker. Tested with no beaker as well. Same issue. Either defective unit completely or the magnets are not aligned. Too dangerous to use in a lab. Glad I tested it with water first.This thing didn't even boil water on the highest setting! Not to mention the cheap construction! The knob for the temperature control just spins to the right indefinitely. You have to listen to the "buzz" of the hot plate to guess the setting. This is barely worth $10. You couldn'e even make ramen noodles with this. Don't buy it.This thing can't even boil 300 ml water had on for over 2 hours max and barely warm if I had packaging I would return.I ordered this in July immediately put it in storage until it was time to use it it was great for about two weeks and then the magnet on the bottom stopped moving so it no longer stirred which is now pointless and useless to me completely wasted my moneyRight out of the box the adjustments knobs do not work...They just spin and spin and spin . can not set anything as far as heat or magnetic stirrerBuyer beware. This could’ve easily destroyed my business in the blink of an eye. Heats up as soon as you plug it in except the buttons were both turned to “off”. I am furious!!I did not get the stirrers or instructions
